methods.description: Deployment of benthic chambers on the deep-sea floor to study the temporal evolution of organic matter processing.

steps.description: In June 2013, two landers equipped with three benthic chambers were deployed at the deep-sea floor.
steps.searchable_summary: deploy landers with benthic chambers on the sea floor

steps.description: A motorized drive lowered the chambers approx. 10 cm into the sediment to enclose 400 cm² of sediment together with approx. 20 cm of overlying water.
steps.searchable_summary: lower chambers into sediment to enclose sediment and water

steps.description: Labelled algae suspensions were added to two of the chambers by means of an automated dispenser.
steps.searchable_summary: add labelled algae suspensions to chambers

steps.description: An O2 optode monitored oxygen concentration and temperature in the overlying water.
steps.searchable_summary: monitor oxygen concentration and temperature with O2 optode

steps.description: An automated syringe sampler took 50 mL subsamples of the overlying water at seven regularly spaced time points.
steps.searchable_summary: collect water subsamples with automated syringe sampler

steps.description: At the end of the incubation, the incubated sediments were enclosed from below with a motorized lid before the chambers were retracted from the sea floor.
steps.searchable_summary: enclose sediments with motorized lid and retract chambers

steps.description: Upon acoustic release from the ship, the lander including the three chambers with the enclosed sediment and the overlying water was recovered.
steps.searchable_summary: recover lander with chambers and enclosed sediment

methods.description: Processing of water and sediment samples collected from the benthic chambers for various analyses.

steps.description: Syringe samples of the overlying water and the sediments were immediately processed.
steps.searchable_summary: process syringe samples of water and sediments

steps.description: Subsamples of the water samples were transferred to exetainers and fixed with HgCl2 for later analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: transfer water subsamples to exetainers and fix with HgCl2

steps.description: Sediments were subsampled at a vertical resolution and mixed prior to subsampling.
steps.searchable_summary: subsample and mix sediments at vertical resolution

steps.description: For pore water analysis, sediment was added to exetainers pre-filled with He-purged water and fixed with HgCl2.
steps.searchable_summary: add sediment to exetainers with He-purged water and fix with HgCl2

steps.description: Pore water was extracted by centrifugation and stored for analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: extract pore water by centrifugation and store
